posts.author: culrich21 (Charlotte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Feature in the Monday.com app to have multiple tabs/boards open at a time so you can toggle between boards and cross reference. Same ideas as using the web-based version and having multiple tabs open with different boards.

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to toggle between boards/tabs in the Monday app.
